common.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this?

landing.hero_subtitle: Designed for privacy, simplicity, and performance. Track your progress, manage your devices, and analyze your shots.
landing.feat_tracking_desc: Record detailed scores, ammunition info, and technical notes for every session.
landing.feat_private_desc: Your data stays on your device by default. Cloud sync is entirely optional — you decide whether your data ever leaves your phone.
landing.feat_stopwatch_desc: Integrated stopwatch for precise training timing and series control.
landing.feat_issf_desc: Main ISSF disciplines included and ready to use.
landing.prem_timer_desc: With times per series/shot to train at the range.
landing.prem_excel_desc: Analyze your performance deeper with simple data export.
landing.prem_unlimited_desc: Record all your history without limits.
landing.prem_custom_desc: Create your own or disable default ones to fit your needs.
landing.prem_sync_desc: Sync your training data across all your devices. Your data, always available.
landing.prem_analytics_desc: Access historical shooting analytics, trends, and performance charts.
landing.feat_inventory_desc: Track your firearms and ammunition in one place.
landing.feat_competitions_desc: Plan and manage your competition schedule with status tracking and countdown timers.
landing.prem_ammo_desc: Track ammo purchases, usage per session, and stock levels.
landing.whitelabel_desc: If you want your own customized version of TriggerTime, with your logo, specific disciplines, and any other functionality you want to add, contact us for a quote.
landing.contact_subtitle: We're here to support you. If you found a bug or have suggestions, reach out to us.
landing.club_pro_desc: For shooting clubs managing multiple members.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy for TriggerTime
privacy.intro_text: Welcome to TriggerTime. We are committed to protecting your privacy while providing you with the best sport shooting analytics experience. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have. Our core principle remains: your data is yours, and we collect only what is necessary to provide the service.
privacy.collection_account_text: When you create a TriggerTime account, we collect your email address, first name, last name, and preferred language. Your password is securely hashed and never stored in plain text.
privacy.collection_training_text: TriggerTime allows you to record shooting scores, training dates, ammunition types, equipment notes, and other session-related data. By default, this data is stored exclusively on your device. If you subscribe to Pro+ and enable cloud sync, this data is transmitted to our servers to allow multi-device access.
privacy.collection_device_text: When you link a device to your account, we store a device identifier to manage your authorized devices and deliver Pro+ features.
privacy.collection_payment_text: Payments are processed entirely by Stripe. TriggerTime never receives, stores, or has access to your credit card numbers or banking details. We only receive confirmation of your subscription status from Stripe.
privacy.usage_text: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.usage_item_1: Provide, maintain, and improve the TriggerTime service
privacy.usage_item_2: Manage your account and authenticate your sessions
privacy.usage_item_3: Process subscriptions and deliver Pro+ features to your linked devices
privacy.usage_item_5: Send essential service communications (e.g., password resets)
privacy.storage_text: We take the security of your data seriously:
privacy.storage_item_1: All data transmission between your devices and our servers uses encrypted HTTPS connections
privacy.storage_item_2: Passwords are cryptographically hashed using industry-standard algorithms
privacy.storage_item_3: Authentication uses secure JWT tokens with limited validity
privacy.storage_item_4: Your training data stays on your device unless you explicitly enable cloud sync via a Pro+ subscription
privacy.sync_item_1: Basic app usage requires no internet connection and no data leaves your device
privacy.sync_item_2: Cloud sync is entirely opt-in and only available to Pro+ subscribers
privacy.sync_item_3: If you enable sync, your training data is transmitted to our servers solely to provide multi-device access
privacy.sync_item_4: You can disable sync at any time; your local data always remains on your device
privacy.sync_item_5: If you delete the app without an active sync, your locally stored data is permanently lost
privacy.third_party_text: We use the following third-party services:
privacy.third_party_item_1_text: For secure payment processing of Pro+ subscriptions. Stripe's privacy policy governs the handling of your payment data.
privacy.third_party_item_2_text: For website analytics to understand how visitors use our site. Only activated after you consent via our cookie banner. Google's privacy policy governs their processing of this data.
privacy.analytics_text: We use Google Analytics 4 (via Google Tag Manager) to understand how visitors interact with our website. This helps us improve the user experience. The following data may be collected when you consent to analytics cookies:
privacy.analytics_item_3: Device type, browser, and approximate location (country/city level from anonymized IP)
privacy.analytics_cookies_text: Analytics cookies are only set after you give consent via our cookie banner (Google Consent Mode v2). The following cookies may be placed:
privacy.analytics_optout: You can opt out at any time by opening your {cookieSettings} from the site footer, or by installing the {browserAddon}.
privacy.marketing_tools_text: We may use additional marketing and analytics tools in the future (such as advertising pixels or heatmap services) to improve our service and marketing efforts. Any such tools will only be activated after you have given consent in the appropriate category (analytics or marketing) via our cookie banner. The cookie consent banner will always reflect the tools currently in use.
privacy.rights_text: In accordance with applicable data protection regulations (including the EU General Data Protection Regulation), you have the right to:
privacy.rights_item_1: Access the personal data we hold about you
privacy.rights_item_3: Request deletion of your account and all associated data
privacy.rights_item_5: Withdraw consent for data processing at any time
privacy.rights_contact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at {email}.
privacy.retention_text: We retain your account and associated data for as long as your account is active. If you request account deletion, we will permanently remove all your personal data and training records from our servers within 30 days. Locally stored data on your device is not affected by account deletion.
privacy.permissions_text: The TriggerTime mobile application may request the following device permissions, used strictly for app functionality:
privacy.permissions_storage_text: To save the local database of your scores and training sessions on your device.
privacy.children_text: TriggerTime is not directed at children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us and we will delete it promptly.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by posting the updated policy on this page with a new "Last updated" date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy.contact_text: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at {email}.

terms.title: Terms of Service for TriggerTime
terms.acceptance_text: By creating an account or using TriggerTime, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the service.
terms.service_text: TriggerTime is a sport shooting analytics application that allows users to record, track, and analyze their shooting training sessions. The service includes a free tier with local-only data storage and an optional paid Pro+ subscription offering cloud sync, multi-device access, and additional features.
terms.account_text: To access certain features, you must create an account. You agree to:
terms.account_item_1: Provide accurate and complete registration information
terms.account_item_2: Maintain the security of your password and account
terms.account_item_3: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
terms.account_item_4: Be responsible for all activity that occurs under your account
terms.subscription_text: Pro+ subscriptions are billed on a recurring basis through Stripe. By subscribing, you agree to:
terms.subscription_item_1: Pay the applicable subscription fees at the current rate
terms.subscription_item_2: Automatic renewal at the end of each billing period unless cancelled
terms.subscription_item_3: Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period — you retain access until then
terms.subscription_item_4: Refunds are handled in accordance with applicable consumer protection laws
terms.use_item_1: Use the service for any unlawful purpose
terms.use_item_2: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems or other users' accounts
terms.use_item_3: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble the application
terms.use_item_4: Use automated systems to access the service in a manner that exceeds reasonable use
terms.use_item_5: Share your account credentials with others or allow third-party access to your account
terms.ip_text: The TriggerTime application, including its design, code, logos, and content, is the intellectual property of TriggerTime. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the application for its intended purpose.
terms.data_text: Your training data belongs to you. TriggerTime does not claim ownership over any data you input into the application. You may export or delete your data at any time. We act only as a custodian of your cloud-synced data to provide the service.
terms.liability_text: TriggerTime is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law:
terms.liability_item_1: We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service
terms.liability_item_2: We are not liable for any data loss resulting from device failure, app deletion, or service interruption
terms.liability_item_3: Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you have paid for the service in the 12 months preceding the claim
terms.termination_text: Either party may terminate this agreement at any time:
terms.termination_item_1: You may delete your account at any time through the application or by contacting us
terms.termination_item_2: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms
terms.termination_item_3: Upon termination, you may request export of your data before it is deleted from our servers
terms.law_text: These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of Spain and applicable European Union regulations. Any disputes shall be resolved in the competent courts of Spain, without prejudice to any mandatory consumer protection provisions of your country of residence.
terms.changes_text: We may modify these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by posting updated terms on this page. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
terms.contact_text: For any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at {email}.

notFound.title: Oops! You missed the target.
notFound.message: We looked everywhere, but it seems this page has gone rogue. Maybe it's hiding behind a barricade? Or maybe you just typed the wrong coordinates.

cookies.banner_text: We use cookies to improve your experience. You can choose which categories to allow. Essential cookies are always active as they are necessary for the site to function.
cookies.essential_desc: Required for the website to function. These cannot be disabled.
cookies.analytics_desc: Help us understand how visitors use our website to improve the experience.
cookies.marketing_desc: Used to deliver relevant advertisements and track campaign effectiveness.
